title: Acilaris

{{Quote|A rock. Seen one, seen them all.|[[Reidi Artom]]|<ref name="LFC" />}}
The innermost world of the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]], '''Acilaris''' was barely large enough to be considered a planetoid. Nevertheless, it had enough [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] to hold an [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]],<ref name="LFC" /> albeit one which was laden with [[Sulfur/Legends|sulfur]], [[Carbon/Legends|carbon]], and [[Boron/Legends|boron]].

The surface of Acilaris was too hot even for a ship to land, and was believed to be rich in natural minerals and crystals. However, the temperature prohibited mining activities. In [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], there were rumors of the droids of [[Uffel]] accepting contracts to design mining machinery able to withstand the local conditions.<ref name="LFC" />

{{Planet-stub}}
